systemStatus.headline: Thu Apr 30 7 AM run — Sling Apr 30 delivered (6 staff, 32.99 hrs). Toast Apr 29 group summary arrived but HTML-only. Yelp bonus $900 EXPIRES TODAY (fully used).
systemStatus.detail: (1) Sling Apr 30 delivered ~7:01 AM PT: 6 staff, 32.99 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 2 off. (2) Toast Apr 29 'Group' summary arrived ~6:12 AM PT — HTML-only / unparseable via Gmail MCP (same pattern as Apr 27/28). The 229 W Montecito DPS for Apr 29 not yet delivered (typically ~7:38 AM PT). Last fully-parsed Toast = Sat Apr 25 ($5,479.75 net / 192 guests / 20.8% labor). (3) Google Ads LIVE Apr 29: 91 clicks, 6,986 impressions, $0.24 CPC, $22.03 cost — strongest CTR week-to-date (1.30%). No disapprovals. (4) Yelp Ads LIVE 30d: $810 spend, 75.5k impressions, 995 page visits, 228 leads, 860 ad clicks. Bonus $900 fully exhausted, EXPIRES TODAY (Apr 30). (5) TripAdvisor: no analytics email from analytics@hm2.tripadvisor.com in last 24h (only marketing/awards emails). (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK. (7) Reviews: no new in last 24h; K Vos 4★ now 7 days unanswered.
